mapper.select: SELECT id, target_type, target_id, user_id, create_time FROM like_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_id = #{postId} AND target_type = 'post'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM like_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_id = #{postId} AND target_type = 'post'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_record WHERE target_id = #{postId} AND target_type = 'post'
SELECT id, target_type, target_id, user_id, create_time FROM like_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_id = #{commentId} AND target_type = 'comment'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM like_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_id = #{commentId} AND target_type = 'comment'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_record WHERE target_id = #{commentId} AND target_type = 'comment'
